description_long: This is a modern, two-story residential house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is predominantly white with large rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light. The house features a spacious driveway and garage on one side, and landscaped areas with trees and shrubs on both the front and rear. There is a small outdoor seating area with a table and chairs, as well as a circular pool or water feature near the entrance. The main entryway is marked by a prominent door with a small overhang and steps leading up to it. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped greenery, and a driveway with garage. Features include a circular pool, outdoor seating, and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, circular pool, outdoor seating, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and additional landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, garage doors, and a more utilitarian aspect of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the outdoor seating area, greenery, and the extended driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent single door with small overhang, steps, and minimal decorative elements
